description: Components used on the Product / view page. Each entry defines markup pattern, variants, token references, and accessibility requirements.

ImageGallery.description: Primary product image with thumbnail strip. Controlled by active_image_index state.

slots.primary_image: Large img element — fills column width

accessibility: primary img has descriptive alt from product.images[n].alt
each thumbnail is a <button type='button'> with aria-label='View image N'
active thumbnail has aria-pressed='true'

ProductMeta.description: Vendor name, product name, tagline, and badge row. Top of the summary column.

slots.vendor: Small muted text above the title
slots.name: H1 — largest heading on page

accessibility: name is H1 — one per page
badges are decorative spans, not interactive

Badge.description: Small label indicating product status. Reused from base design system.
accessibility: decorative — no role required
if sole indicator of a critical state (e.g. sold_out), pair with text elsewhere

PriceBlock.description: Displays regular price, optional sale price, and optional variant delta.

slots.sale_price: Large, prominent — shown when product.price.sale is not null
slots.regular_price: Struck through when sale is active; primary when no sale
slots.delta: Small inline label e.g. '+ $20' shown when selected variant has price_delta

accessibility: struck price has aria-label='Regular price $X' to avoid confusing screen readers
sale price has aria-label='Sale price $X'

VariantSelector.description: Radio-button group for selecting a product variant (e.g. board length). One axis only per this recipe.

VariantOption.out_of_stock_treatment: visually muted + diagonal strikethrough line; input disabled; label appends '(sold out)' for screen readers

accessibility: wrapped in <fieldset>
axis label is <legend>
each option is <input type='radio'> with matching <label for>
disabled options have disabled attribute and aria-disabled='true'

AddToCart.description: Primary CTA button. Full width on mobile, full width in summary column on desktop.
accessibility: type='button'
when disabled: aria-disabled='true', aria-describedby points to reason text
do not use HTML disabled attribute alone — preserves focus for keyboard users

SoldOutNotice.description: Replaces AddToCart when entire product is out of stock. Informs user and optionally offers notify action.

slots.message: 'This product is currently out of stock'
slots.action: Optional ghost button: 'Notify me when available'

accessibility: role='status' on the notice container

Tabs.description: Tabbed content area for description, features, and specs. Below the fold.

slots.tabpanels: One panel per tab, only active is visible

accessibility: role='tablist' on container
role='tab' + aria-selected + aria-controls on each tab button
role='tabpanel' + aria-labelledby on each panel
inactive panels: hidden attribute (not just display:none via CSS)

FeatureList.description: Unordered list of product feature strings.
accessibility: rendered as <ul> with <li> items — no special roles needed

SpecTable.description: Two-column table of label/value spec pairs.
accessibility: <table> with <th scope='row'> for spec labels
caption is visually hidden: 'Product specifications'

RichText.description: Prose content area. Renders product.description with basic typographic styles.
accessibility: if content is HTML, sanitize before render
no role required — is plain prose
